data.title: Distributed Systems
data.description: Google's infrastructure is built on distributed systems for scalability and reliability.
data.technical_spec: Spanner, Bigtable, and Borg are core components.

data.title: Microservices
data.description: Applications are structured as microservices, promoting modularity.
data.technical_spec: Containers, GKE, and Pub/Sub for event-driven architecture.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Efficient load balancing across multiple regions.
data.technical_spec: Cloud Load Balancing and Anycast technology.

data.title: Edge Computing
data.description: Utilizing edge locations to reduce latency and enhance performance.
data.technical_spec: Content delivery network (CDN) and edge caching mechanisms.

data.title: Data Replication
data.description: Data is replicated across data centers for fault tolerance.
data.technical_spec: Global file system, and real-time replication strategies.
